codeReview.summary: The feature is correctly implemented. The LlmBackend trait in swell-core now includes the stream() method with the correct signature, and all three backends (Anthropic, OpenAI, Mock) implement it properly. The implementations delegate to existing stream methods on the backend structs.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker added a new with_base_url_and_retry constructor to AnthropicBackend for proxy support. This is a reasonable addition but wasn't mentioned in the feature description. No issues with AGENTS.md documentation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: crates/swell-llm/src/anthropic.rs:139-166 - new pub fn with_base_url_and_retry constructor

summary: Feature implementation is correct and complete. The stream() method was added to the LlmBackend trait with the correct signature matching the expected behavior. All three backends (Anthropic, OpenAI, Mock) implement the stream() method properly. Verification steps (cargo check, cargo test, cargo clippy) all pass with no issues.
